evidence we fell from spiritual world? sastric if possible prabhus...

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2010-06-04 · 5 answers
1) where is the evidence we fell from the spiritual world?
2) what guarantees us when we reach the spiritual world again we wont fall again?
user [38] · 2010-06-05

user [170] · 2010-06-06
Evidence is Bhagavad Gita. 8.21
user [579] · 2010-06-09
We all didnt fall some of us are here to give him service.Krishna in his spiritual station shown himself to all cultures ( all of us),but when it came around to his dark brown skin color they refuse to take orders from him.So he place them into the material to carry out their desires; thats to hurt him and those he love.Those thats in this world giving him service are two fold.One: the sacrifice of letting them torture us.Two: we are here to clean the world of them.

You see they have been curse by him to be actual filth you see building up from not cleaning. Krishna said that thats them.
They are filth personified.They all have similar pale looking faces rather male or female and he illusion them as regular ppl(family members;friends).And its because of them that we have this classification of the races or this race is better in quality,when in truth thats them behaving that way.
user [588] · 2010-07-01
Bg 13:19 Krishna says that both Purusha and Prakriti are eternal and that transformation takes place in Prakriti only.

What is your definition of spiritual and material???

Since everything is permeated by the Lord, everything is spiritual.

Hare Krishna.
